daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving main character energy today, Sag. The cosmos is rewinding your confidence dial—lean into whatever feels authentically *you* and watch how the day shifts around it.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner's picking up on your magnetic frequency rn. Single? Someone's noticing the glow you're not even trying to project. Either way, just be genuinely yourself.
daily.career: Your ideas have teeth today—the kind that actually move things forward. Trust your instincts in conversations, especially if you've been sitting on something worth saying.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Whether it's a walk, dancing in your room, or stretching, listen to what your energy actually craves rather than forcing a routine.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are giving you clarity this week, Sag. You're shedding what no longer serves and stepping into your power. Trust the timing—even the slow moments are building something real.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet nothings, but the real magic is in being authentically you. Whether single or coupled, your vibe is magnetic rn. Don't overthink it—just show up as you are.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked. This is the week to pitch that idea or pivot toward something that actually fulfills you. The universe is backing your boldness, so lean in.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and rest in equal measure. Find joy in how your physical self feels rather than chasing goals. Dance, walk, breathe—simple rituals hit different right now.
